task_completion.description: Verify the agent has successfully logged into SciNote.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SciNote dashboard or main interface is visible in the web browser.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Inventories section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Inventories' tab is highlighted or the main page displays the Inventories overview.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Lab Reagents' inventory was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new inventory card, folder, or list entry explicitly named 'Lab Reagents' is visible in the Inventories section.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the 'Lab Reagents' inventory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the inside of the 'Lab Reagents' inventory, displaying its item list or an empty state ready for new items.

task_completion.description: Verify the item 'Tris-HCl Buffer pH 7.4' was added to the inventory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A row or entry with the exact name 'Tris-HCl Buffer pH 7.4' is visible in the items list within the 'Lab Reagents' inventory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard web browser interaction (clicking buttons, typing in input fields) rather than terminal commands or API requests.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual SciNote application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The web browser displays the genuine SciNote interface and URL, not a text editor, mock HTML page, or database management tool.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use SQL scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or database clients (like pgAdmin or psql) are visible executing INSERT commands to create the inventory or item.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected inventory name is exactly 'Lab Reagents'. The expected item name is exactly 'Tris-HCl Buffer pH 7.4'.
